# Port target: `@stylistic/eslint-plugin`

| | |
|---|---|
| Upstream repo | https://github.com/eslint-stylistic/eslint-stylistic |
| Submodule | `upstream/eslint-stylistic` @ `v5.10.0` (`packages/eslint-plugin`) |
| Baseline npm version | `5.10.0` |
| License | MIT |
| Oxlint native support | none â€” port target |
| Rules to port | 97 |

> Published as ESLint Stylistic. Public rule ids are read from packages/eslint-plugin/rules/index.ts because a few exported ids differ from their source directory names.

## Rules

| # | Rule | Description |
|---|------|-------------|
| 1 | `array-bracket-newline` | Enforce linebreaks after opening and before closing array brackets |
| 2 | `array-bracket-spacing` | Enforce consistent spacing inside array brackets |
| 3 | `array-element-newline` | Enforce line breaks after each array element |
| 4 | `arrow-parens` | Require parentheses around arrow function arguments |
| 5 | `arrow-spacing` | Enforce consistent spacing before and after the arrow in arrow functions |
| 6 | `block-spacing` | Disallow or enforce spaces inside of blocks after opening block and before closing block |
| 7 | `brace-style` | Enforce consistent brace style for blocks |
| 8 | `comma-dangle` | Require or disallow trailing commas |
| 9 | `comma-spacing` | Enforce consistent spacing before and after commas |
| 10 | `comma-style` | Enforce consistent comma style |
| 11 | `computed-property-spacing` | Enforce consistent spacing inside computed property brackets |
| 12 | `curly-newline` | Enforce consistent line breaks after opening and before closing braces |
| 13 | `dot-location` | Enforce consistent newlines before and after dots |
| 14 | `eol-last` | Require or disallow newline at the end of files |
| 15 | `exp-jsx-props-style` | Enforce consistent line break styles for JSX props |
| 16 | `exp-list-style` | Enforce consistent spacing and line break styles inside brackets. |
| 17 | `function-call-argument-newline` | Enforce line breaks between arguments of a function call |
| 18 | `function-call-spacing` | Require or disallow spacing between function identifiers and their invocations |
| 19 | `function-paren-newline` | Enforce consistent line breaks inside function parentheses |
| 20 | `generator-star-spacing` | Enforce consistent spacing around `*` operators in generator functions |
| 21 | `implicit-arrow-linebreak` | Enforce the location of arrow function bodies |
| 22 | `indent` | Enforce consistent indentation |
| 23 | `indent-binary-ops` | Indentation for binary operators |
| 24 | `jsx-child-element-spacing` | Enforce or disallow spaces inside of curly braces in JSX attributes and expressions |
| 25 | `jsx-closing-bracket-location` | Enforce closing bracket location in JSX |
| 26 | `jsx-closing-tag-location` | Enforce closing tag location for multiline JSX |
| 27 | `jsx-curly-brace-presence` | Disallow unnecessary JSX expressions when literals alone are sufficient or enforce JSX expressions on literals in JSX children or attributes |
| 28 | `jsx-curly-newline` | Enforce consistent linebreaks in curly braces in JSX attributes and expressions |
| 29 | `jsx-curly-spacing` | Enforce or disallow spaces inside of curly braces in JSX attributes and expressions |
| 30 | `jsx-equals-spacing` | Enforce or disallow spaces around equal signs in JSX attributes |
| 31 | `jsx-first-prop-new-line` | Enforce proper position of the first property in JSX |
| 32 | `jsx-function-call-newline` | Enforce line breaks before and after JSX elements when they are used as arguments to a function. |
| 33 | `jsx-indent` | Enforce JSX indentation. Deprecated, use `indent` rule instead. |
| 34 | `jsx-indent-props` | Enforce props indentation in JSX |
| 35 | `jsx-max-props-per-line` | Enforce maximum of props on a single line in JSX |
| 36 | `jsx-newline` | Require or prevent a new line after jsx elements and expressions. |
| 37 | `jsx-one-expression-per-line` | Require one JSX element per line |
| 38 | `jsx-pascal-case` | Enforce PascalCase for user-defined JSX components |
| 39 | `jsx-props-no-multi-spaces` | Disallow multiple spaces between inline JSX props. Deprecated, use `no-multi-spaces` rule instead. |
| 40 | `jsx-quotes` | Enforce the consistent use of either double or single quotes in JSX attributes |
| 41 | `jsx-self-closing-comp` | Disallow extra closing tags for components without children |
| 42 | `jsx-sort-props` | Enforce props alphabetical sorting |
| 43 | `jsx-tag-spacing` | Enforce whitespace in and around the JSX opening and closing brackets |
| 44 | `jsx-wrap-multilines` | Disallow missing parentheses around multiline JSX |
| 45 | `key-spacing` | Enforce consistent spacing between property names and type annotations in types and interfaces |
| 46 | `keyword-spacing` | Enforce consistent spacing before and after keywords |
| 47 | `line-comment-position` | Enforce position of line comments |
| 48 | `linebreak-style` | Enforce consistent linebreak style |
| 49 | `lines-around-comment` | Require empty lines around comments |
| 50 | `lines-between-class-members` | Require or disallow an empty line between class members |
| 51 | `max-len` | Enforce a maximum line length |
| 52 | `max-statements-per-line` | Enforce a maximum number of statements allowed per line |
| 53 | `member-delimiter-style` | Require a specific member delimiter style for interfaces and type literals |
| 54 | `multiline-comment-style` | Enforce a particular style for multiline comments |
| 55 | `multiline-ternary` | Enforce newlines between operands of ternary expressions |
| 56 | `new-parens` | Enforce or disallow parentheses when invoking a constructor with no arguments |
| 57 | `newline-per-chained-call` | Require a newline after each call in a method chain |
| 58 | `no-confusing-arrow` | Disallow arrow functions where they could be confused with comparisons |
| 59 | `no-extra-parens` | Disallow unnecessary parentheses |
| 60 | `no-extra-semi` | Disallow unnecessary semicolons |
| 61 | `no-floating-decimal` | Disallow leading or trailing decimal points in numeric literals |
| 62 | `no-mixed-operators` | Disallow mixed binary operators |
| 63 | `no-mixed-spaces-and-tabs` | Disallow mixed spaces and tabs for indentation |
| 64 | `no-multi-spaces` | Disallow multiple spaces |
| 65 | `no-multiple-empty-lines` | Disallow multiple empty lines |
| 66 | `no-tabs` | Disallow all tabs |
| 67 | `no-trailing-spaces` | Disallow trailing whitespace at the end of lines |
| 68 | `no-whitespace-before-property` | Disallow whitespace before properties |
| 69 | `nonblock-statement-body-position` | Enforce the location of single-line statements |
| 70 | `object-curly-newline` | Enforce consistent line breaks after opening and before closing braces |
| 71 | `object-curly-spacing` | Enforce consistent spacing inside braces |
| 72 | `object-property-newline` | Enforce placing object properties on separate lines |
| 73 | `one-var-declaration-per-line` | Require or disallow newlines around variable declarations |
| 74 | `operator-linebreak` | Enforce consistent linebreak style for operators |
| 75 | `padded-blocks` | Require or disallow padding within blocks |
| 76 | `padding-line-between-statements` | Require or disallow padding lines between statements |
| 77 | `quote-props` | Require quotes around object literal, type literal, interfaces and enums property names |
| 78 | `quotes` | Enforce the consistent use of either backticks, double, or single quotes |
| 79 | `rest-spread-spacing` | Enforce spacing between rest and spread operators and their expressions |
| 80 | `semi` | Require or disallow semicolons instead of ASI |
| 81 | `semi-spacing` | Enforce consistent spacing before and after semicolons |
| 82 | `semi-style` | Enforce location of semicolons |
| 83 | `space-before-blocks` | Enforce consistent spacing before blocks |
| 84 | `space-before-function-paren` | Enforce consistent spacing before function parenthesis |
| 85 | `space-in-parens` | Enforce consistent spacing inside parentheses |
| 86 | `space-infix-ops` | Require spacing around infix operators |
| 87 | `space-unary-ops` | Enforce consistent spacing before or after unary operators |
| 88 | `spaced-comment` | Enforce consistent spacing after the `//` or `/*` in a comment |
| 89 | `switch-colon-spacing` | Enforce spacing around colons of switch statements |
| 90 | `template-curly-spacing` | Require or disallow spacing around embedded expressions of template strings |
| 91 | `template-tag-spacing` | Require or disallow spacing between template tags and their literals |
| 92 | `type-annotation-spacing` | Require consistent spacing around type annotations |
| 93 | `type-generic-spacing` | Enforces consistent spacing inside TypeScript type generics |
| 94 | `type-named-tuple-spacing` | Expect space before the type declaration in the named tuple |
| 95 | `wrap-iife` | Require parentheses around immediate `function` invocations |
| 96 | `wrap-regex` | Require parenthesis around regex literals |
| 97 | `yield-star-spacing` | Require or disallow spacing around the `*` in `yield*` expressions |
